Looking at the failure modes:

Wait, but let me double-check. The code's output had three roots, but the assistant correctly picked the valid one. The verification here was done properly. So all verification steps were okay. 

Therefore, none of the failure modes apply here. The task was successfully completed without any issues according to the given definitions.
